name: Language switcher
structure: rounded-full segmented toggle or dropdown, active = filled chip
notes: BRIEFING §7 + §8.2 — PROMOTED TO CORE. Bilingual (DE/EN min, often +FR/IT) is table-stakes for CH; only 1 of 4 built sites has it.
visual: Segmented pill DE/EN(/FR/IT) toggle or a Globe menu; active = filled chip. CH region/locale where relevant.
placement: Top-right of nav (CH multilingual) or in the footer (intl region switch).
states: Active chip filled; switching swaps content locale.
animation: Active chip slides/cross-fades; content locale swaps with a quick fade.
